text: What is the maximum reliable shelf life of a filter gas mask canister if the seal is unbroken?

options.text: 1 year from the date of manufacture
3 years from the date of manufacture
5 years from the date of manufacture
7 years from the date of manufacture

explanation: The shelf life of filter canisters is limited by the degradation of the absorbent materials over time. Most manufacturers stipulate a 5-year maximum shelf life for sealed canisters to guarantee integrity.
